name: Princeton University
count_method: official Princeton Admission Degrees & Departments page states students can choose from among 37 concentrations

name: Yale University
count_method: counted unique Yale College major entries (B.A./B.S.) on the official Yale catalog page 'Majors in Yale College'

name: California Institute of Technology
count_method: counted unique program pages linked from the official Caltech 'Majors & Minors' page

name: University of Chicago
count_method: official UChicago Areas of Study page says the College includes nearly 70 majors and 60 minors

name: University of Pennsylvania
count_method: counted visible major/concentration/program entries listed across Penn's undergraduate schools on the official Penn Admissions 'Majors and Minors' page; minors were excluded from the count

name: Columbia University
count_method: official Columbia admissions pages were blocked by CloudFront in this environment; Columbia bulletin pages were partially accessible but not enough to derive a reliable undergraduate majors total here

name: Duke University
count_method: official Duke 'Majors, Minors, and More' page states Duke offers 63 majors, 61 minors, and 23 certificates
